title: US Plugs the Chip Leak to China - TCR 06/01/26
description:
The U.S.
Commerce Department closed a year-old loophole that let hundreds of thousands of top Nvidia Rubin and Blackwell chips reach Chinese firms abroad, Nvidia released Cosmos 3 as an open-weights robotics omni-model on Hugging Face, and Cadence and Nvidia demonstrated a fully autonomous chip-design agent that compresses months of verification into roughly a day.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-june-1-2026/

0:00 Nvidia releases Cosmos 3 as an open physical-AI model
1:55 US closes the Nvidia chip loophole to China
4:36 A Brain for Robots, Posted for Free
7:32 Cadence and Nvidia demo an autonomous chip-design agent
10:16 The Pentagon pushes battlefield AI as commanders urge restraint
12:58 SMArT gene-editing selection hits near-total purity
15:31 Close

This episode covers the Nvidia chip export-control loophole and Commerce Department patch, the Cosmos 3 open physical-AI model and Cosmos Coalition, the Cadence Level 5 autonomous EDA agent, the SMArT gene-editing selection method that hit 80-100% purity in blood stem cells, SOCOM chief Adm. Frank Bradley urging restraint on battlefield AI, and the Amdocs, SentinelOne, and Schneider Electric labor divergence.

The headlining story is the leak that documents the limits of the chip chokepoint: for nearly a year, the overseas arms of Chinese firms bought frontier-class accelerators without a license, the precise outcome export controls were built to prevent, and the weekend patch does not unplug the data centers already running them. Underneath it, capability keeps diffusing outward. Nvidia put a world model for robots into open weights anyone can download, and an autonomous agent began verifying the silicon AI itself runs on. Medicine compressed from the inside as a selection gate pushed gene-edited blood stem cells to near-total purity while discarding the damaged ones. A combatant commander urged troops to be very careful before handing lethal judgment to machines, articulating a verification standard from inside the institution doing the deploying. And the labor question split into a choice: profitable firms cutting staff to AI restructuring while a French manufacturer widened its workers' reach instead.

Additional Reading:
- CNBC: U.S. Takes Step to Halt Nvidia AI Chip Shipments to Chinese Firms Outside China: https://www.cnbc.com/2026/05/31/us-takes-step-to-halt-nvidia-ai-chip-shipments-to-chinese-firms-outside-china.html
- NVIDIA: Launches Cosmos 3, the Open Frontier Foundation Model for Physical AI: https://nvidianews.nvidia.com/news/nvidia-launches-cosmos-3-the-open-frontier-foundation-model-for-physical-ai
- Forbes: Cadence and Nvidia Team to Develop First Fully Autonomous EDA Agent: https://www.forbes.com/sites/karlfreund/2026/06/01/cadence-and-nvidia-team-to-develop-first--fully-autonomous-eda-agent/
- Nature Biotechnology: Selection of Human Hematopoietic Stem Cells Bearing the Intended Functional Edit: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41587-026-03142-z
- Shared Sapience - The Century Report May 25, 2026: https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-may-25-2026/
